framework.name: Sundhedsdatastyrelsen IT Security Requirements
framework.scope: IT security requirements for organizations processing health data in Denmark, covering patient data protection, system security, availability, physical security, and governance
framework.structure_description: Requirements organized by domain: patient data protection, system security, availability, physical security, and governance. All requirements apply to organizations handling Danish health data.

controls.title: Access control to patient data
controls.description: Access to patient data must be strictly controlled with role-based access control and logging of all lookups.
controls.description_nl: Adgang til patientdata skal styres strengt med rollebaseret adgangskontrol og logning af alle opslag.

controls.title: Emergency access to patient data
controls.description: There must be a documented emergency access procedure that grants access in emergencies with subsequent review.
controls.description_nl: Der skal vaere en dokumenteret noedadgangsprocedure der giver adgang i noedsituationer med efterfoelgende kontrol.

controls.title: Logging of patient data access
controls.description: All access to patient data must be logged with user ID, timestamp, patient ID, and purpose in the system access log.
controls.description_nl: Alle opslag i patientdata skal logges med bruger-ID, tidspunkt, patient-ID og formel adgang i systemets adgangslog.

controls.title: Patient right to access log information
controls.description: The patient must be able to gain insight into who has looked up their data.
controls.description_nl: Patienten skal kunne fa indsigt i hvem der har slaaet op i vedkommendes data.

controls.title: Consent management for health data
controls.description: Processing of health data must be based on valid consent or other legal basis with clear documentation.
controls.description_nl: Behandling af sundhedsdata skal baseres pa gyldigt samtykke eller anden lovhjemmel med klar dokumentation.

controls.title: Encryption of health data
controls.description: Health data must be encrypted both in transit and at rest with approved encryption algorithms.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsdata skal krypteres bade i transit og i hvile med godkendte krypteringsalgoritmer.

controls.title: Secure integration between health systems
controls.description: Integration between health systems must use secure protocols and mutual authentication.
controls.description_nl: Integration mellem sundhedssystemer skal anvende sikre protokoller og gensidig autentifikation.

controls.title: Secure communication via Health Data Network
controls.description: Communication via the Health Data Network must comply with applicable security and certification requirements.
controls.description_nl: Kommunikation via Sundhedsdatanettet skal overholde de gaeldende sikkerhedskrav og certificeringskrav.

controls.title: Authentication in health systems
controls.description: Users of health systems must be authenticated with multi-factor authentication or health certificates.
controls.description_nl: Brugere af sundhedssystemer skal autentificeres med flerfaktorautentifikation eller sundhedscertifikater.

controls.title: Vulnerability management in health systems
controls.description: Health systems must be scanned regularly for vulnerabilities and patches must be installed in a timely manner.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedssystemer skal scannes regelmaeessigt for sarbarheder og patches skal installeres rettidigt.

controls.title: High availability for critical health systems
controls.description: Critical health systems must have high-availability architecture with defined RTO and RPO.
controls.description_nl: Kritiske sundhedssystemer skal have hoejtilgaengelighedsarkitektur med definerede RTO og RPO.

controls.title: Backup of health data
controls.description: Health data must be backed up daily with recovery testing at least quarterly.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsdata skal sikkerhedskopieres dagligt med test af gendannelse mindst kvartalsmaeessigt.

controls.title: IT contingency for the health sector
controls.description: Health organizations must have IT contingency plans that ensure continued patient care during IT outages.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsorganisationer skal have IT-beredskabsplaner der sikrer fortsat patientbehandling under IT-nedbrud.

controls.title: Physical security of health data
controls.description: Physical premises with health data and systems must have access control and monitoring.
controls.description_nl: Fysiske lokaler med sundhedsdata og -systemer skal have adgangskontrol og overvagning.

controls.title: Secure disposal of health data
controls.description: Media and equipment containing health data must be securely destroyed upon disposal.
controls.description_nl: Medier og udstyr der indeholder sundhedsdata skal destrueres sikkert ved bortskaffelse.

controls.title: Security organization in the health sector
controls.description: Health organizations must have a dedicated information security function with reporting to management.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsorganisationer skal have en dedikeret informationssikkerhedsfunktion med rapportering til ledelsen.

controls.title: Risk assessment of health systems
controls.description: Regular risk assessments of all health systems must be conducted with focus on patient data.
controls.description_nl: Der skal gennemfores regelmaeessige risikovurderinger af alle sundhedssystemer med fokus pa patientdata.

controls.title: Incident management in the health sector
controls.description: Health organizations must have an incident management process with special focus on data breaches concerning patient data.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsorganisationer skal have en haendelseshandteringsproces med saerlig fokus pa databrud vedroeerende patientdata.

controls.title: Training of health personnel
controls.description: Health personnel must receive regular training in information security and data protection.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedspersonale skal modtage regelmaeessig uddannelse i informationssikkerhed og databeskyttelse.

controls.title: Supplier management in the health sector
controls.description: Suppliers of health systems must comply with security requirements and be subject to regular audit.
controls.description_nl: Leverandoerer af sundhedssystemer skal overholde sikkerhedskrav og underkastes regelmaeessig audit.

controls.title: Compliance with health legislation
controls.description: Health organizations must ensure compliance with the Health Act, Authorization Act, and Personal Data Regulation.
controls.description_nl: Sundhedsorganisationer skal sikre overensstemmelse med sundhedsloven, autorisationsloven og persondataforordningen.

metadata.source: Sundhedsdatastyrelsen IT security requirements (compiled from published guidance)
